zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud Billung von Sachsen於1034年出生在德國貝也史維音福特時，她的父親Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II39歲，母親Eilika von Schweinfurt49歲。她於1050年與Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1113年8月4日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫維恩享年79歲，埋葬在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫維恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud Billung von Sachsen于1034年出生在德国貝也史維音福特时，她的父亲Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II39岁，母亲Eilika von Schweinfurt49岁。她于1050年与Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1113年8月4日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫維恩享年79岁，埋葬在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫維恩。

nameMeanings.name: Billung
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Billing, derived from Old English bil ‘sword’, or a habitational name from Great and Little Billing in Northamptonshire, meaning ‘(settlement of) the followers (Old English -ingas) of a man called Bill(a) or Bȳdel’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, formed with a cognate of Old Saxon bīl ‘sword’.
Danish and Norwegian: from an Old Danish personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Billings
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Billing , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belling
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Belling, in Pomerania, Baden, Hesse, Thuringia, and elsewhere.

English (Devon): perhaps from the Middle English personal name Belling, Beling, of uncertain origin (perhaps from Old English Bǣdling, an original nickname from bǣdling ‘effeminate man’). Alternatively, a variant of Billing .

variants.name: Billinger
meanings: German: from the personal name   Billing   2.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sachsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably from a placename Sachenbach in southern Germany, the first part of which is from Old High German saher ‘reed grass’ or ‘swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud Billung von Sachsen was born in 1034, in Schweinfurt, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, was 39 and her mother, Eilika von Schweinfurt, was 49. She married Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland in 1050. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 August 1113, in Veurne, West Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 79, and was buried in Veurne, West Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud Billung von Sachsen est née en 1034, à Schweinfurt, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Eilika von Schweinfurt, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland en 1050. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1113, à Furnes, Flandre occidentale, Belgique, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Furnes, Flandre occidentale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud Billung von Sachsen 1034 in Schweinfurt, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II 39 und ihre Mutter Eilika von Schweinfurt 49. Sie hat 1050 Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. August 1113 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Veurne, West-Flandern, Belgien und wurde in Veurne, West-Flandern, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Billung von Sachsen è nata il nel 1034 nel Schweinfurt, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Eilika von Schweinfurt, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland nel 1050. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1113, nel Veurne, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Veurne, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud Billung von Sachsenが1034年にドイツバイエルンスチウエインファートで生まれた時，父Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen IIは39歳，母Eilika von Schweinfurtは49歳であった。1050年にFloris I van Holland graaf van West-Frieslandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1113年8月4日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンベウルンで79歳で死去し，ベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンベウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(이)가 1034년 독일 베이른 슈위퍼트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eilika von Schweinfurt(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1050년 Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1113년 8월 4일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브우른에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 브우른에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond-Binnen, Egmond, Noord-Holland, Ne: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Billung von Sachsen nasceu em 1034, em Schweinfurt, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland em 1050. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1113, em Veurne, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Veurne, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica.

ro.La Haye, Holland, Pays-Bas: Den Haag, Holland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud Billung von Sachsen родилась в 1034 г. в местности щвинфурт, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Eilika von Schweinfurt, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland в 1050 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 августа 1113 г. в местности веурн, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности веурн, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud Billung von Sachsen nació en 1034, en Schweinfurt, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Herzog Bernhard Billung von Sachsen II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Eilika von Schweinfurt, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland en 1050. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1113, en Veurne, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Veurne, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica.

th.Saint-Lambert-sur-Dives, Orne, Lower Nor: ซินต-ลัมเบิร์-ซูร-ดิเวส, ออรน์, บาสเซ-นอรมันดี, ฝรั่งเศส
th.Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Germany: ลูเนเบิรก, นีเดอรซาชเซน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Flanders, Belgium: ฟลาานเดอเรน, เบลเยียม
th.Schweinfurt, Bayern, Allemagne: ชวินฟอร์, เบยอรน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
